nasb.text: “Now because of all this We are making an agreement in writing; And on the sealed document are the names of our leaders, our Levites and our priests.”

esv.text: “Because of all this we make a firm covenant in writing; on the sealed document are the names of our princes, our Levites, and our priests.

cnv.text: 現在由於這一切事， 我們立下確實的約，寫在文件上； 我們的領袖、利未人和祭司，都在上面蓋了印。”

ccb.text: “鉴于这一切，我们郑重立约，记载下来。我们的首领、利未人和祭司都在上面盖了印。”
